# Asena

> High-performance IoC web framework built on Bun runtime with decorator-based dependency injection, achieving 200k-300k requests/sec.

- Documentation: https://asena.sh
- GitHub: https://github.com/AsenaJs/Asena
- Examples: https://github.com/LibirSoft/AsenaExample

## Docs

- [Philosophy](https://asena.sh/raw/philosophy.md): Why Asena exists - bringing Spring Boot patterns to TypeScript with automatic component discovery and field-based DI
- [Getting Started](https://asena.sh/raw/get-started.md): Installation, prerequisites, TypeScript configuration, and creating your first Asena project
- [Examples](https://asena.sh/raw/examples.md): Real-world examples including REST APIs, WebSocket chat, authentication, and database integration
- [Showcase](https://asena.sh/raw/showcase.md): Production applications built with Asena Framework
- [Roadmap](https://asena.sh/raw/roadmap.md): Development roadmap - completed features, active development, and future plans

## Concepts

- [Controllers](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/controllers.md): HTTP route controllers with @Controller decorator, method decorators (@Get, @Post, etc.), and route parameters
- [Services](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/services.md): Business logic services with @Service decorator, singleton and prototype scopes
- [Dependency Injection](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/dependency-injection.md): Field-based dependency injection with @Inject decorator, class-based and string-based injection
- [Middleware](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/middleware.md): Custom middleware with @Middleware decorator, global/pattern-based/route-level middleware
- [Context](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/context.md): Unified request/response API - getParam, getQuery, getBody, send, json, html across all adapters
- [Validation](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/validation.md): Zod-based request validation with @Validation decorator (Ergenecore adapter only)
- [Static File Serving](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/static-files.md): Serve static files with @StaticServe decorator and lifecycle hooks
- [WebSocket](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/websocket.md): WebSocket services with @WebSocket decorator, built-in room management, and middleware support
- [Ulak](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/ulak.md): Centralized WebSocket message broker for breaking circular dependencies between services and WebSocket handlers
- [Event System](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/event-system.md): Decoupled event-driven architecture with @EventService, @On decorators, and wildcard pattern matching
- [Scheduled Tasks](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/scheduled-tasks.md): Cron-based task scheduling with @Schedule decorator using Bun's native cron support
- [Frontend Controller](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/frontend-controller.md): Serve HTML pages with @FrontendController and @Page decorators using Bun's native HTML imports
- [PostProcessor](https://asena.sh/raw/concepts/post-processor.md): Component interception system for transforming instances during IoC bootstrap

## Adapters

- [Overview](https://asena.sh/raw/adapters/overview.md): Comparison between Ergenecore and Hono adapters - performance, features, and use cases
- [Ergenecore](https://asena.sh/raw/adapters/ergenecore.md): Bun-native adapter with zero dependencies, built-in CORS and rate limiting, ~295k req/sec
- [Hono](https://asena.sh/raw/adapters/hono.md): Hono framework-based adapter with @Override decorator for native Hono context access, ~233k req/sec

## Packages

- [Logger](https://asena.sh/raw/packages/logger.md): Winston-based logging with AsenaLogger - log levels, custom transports, and performance profiling
- [Drizzle ORM](https://asena.sh/raw/packages/drizzle.md): Database integration with @Database and @Repository decorators, BaseRepository CRUD, and transaction support
- [OpenAPI](https://asena.sh/raw/packages/openapi.md): Automatic OpenAPI 3.1 spec generation with built-in Swagger UI, zero-config setup
- [OpenTelemetry](https://asena.sh/raw/packages/opentelemetry.md): Automatic HTTP tracing, method-level auto-tracing, metrics, and W3C distributed tracing
- [Redis](https://asena.sh/raw/packages/redis.md): Redis integration with @Redis decorator, multi-pod WebSocket transport, and full Redis operations

## CLI

- [Overview](https://asena.sh/raw/cli/overview.md): Asena CLI for project scaffolding, code generation, dev server, and production builds
- [Installation](https://asena.sh/raw/cli/installation.md): Install @asenajs/asena-cli globally with Bun, prerequisites, and troubleshooting
- [Commands](https://asena.sh/raw/cli/commands.md): CLI commands - create, generate (controller/service/middleware/websocket/config), dev start, build, init
- [Configuration](https://asena.sh/raw/cli/configuration.md): asena.config.ts with defineConfig - sourceFolder, rootFile, buildOptions (minify, sourcemap, external)
- [Suffix Configuration](https://asena.sh/raw/cli/suffix-configuration.md): Configure file name suffixes for generated components
- [Examples](https://asena.sh/raw/cli/examples.md): Step-by-step tutorial from project creation to production deployment

## Guides

- [Configuration](https://asena.sh/raw/guides/configuration.md): Server configuration with @Config decorator - global middleware, error handling, environment variables
- [Error Handling](https://asena.sh/raw/guides/error-handling.md): Error handling patterns - throwing exceptions, global error handlers, custom error classes

## Testing

- [Overview](https://asena.sh/raw/testing/overview.md): Built-in testing utilities with Bun's native test runner and automatic dependency mocking
- [MockComponent API](https://asena.sh/raw/testing/mock-component.md): API reference for mockComponent and mockComponentAsync - automatic discovery and mocking of injected dependencies
- [Examples](https://asena.sh/raw/testing/examples.md): Real-world testing patterns for controllers, services, WebSockets, and middleware

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/AsenaJs/Asena)
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@asenajs/asena)
- [Bun Runtime](https://bun.sh/docs)
